title: ICT Silver Bullet MYTH Busted (2026)
description: Everyone thinks the ICT Silver Bullet only works at specific times. They're dead wrong. Here's what R2F Trading actually teaches — and why funded traders swear by it. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily setups.
script: Four funded accounts. All from one concept. And everyone's been teaching it wrong. The myth — the Silver Bullet only works between 10 and 11 AM New York time. That's why 80% of traders using it keep losing. The time is a window — not the strategy. The truth — the Silver Bullet is about the fair value gap INSIDE a liquidity sweep. Time is secondary. No sweep. No trade. It's that simple. The R2F Trading system filters 90% of bad entries this way. Run the Silver Bullet with a liquidity sweep first — watch your funded account stop failing. Follow R2F Trading. We break down setups like this every single day at r2ftrading.com.
